title: Decadent Silky Spanish Dates Fideua
description: A rich and savory Spanish dish featuring stoned dates and tempering chocolate, perfect for a special occasion, and diabetic friendly due to the use of dark chocolate and portion control.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the fideua noodles and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the dry white wine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 10 minutes, or until the noodles are tender.
While the noodles are cooking, melt the dark chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Stir the melted chocolate into the noodle mixture and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the pitted dates and cook for 1 minute, or until heated through.
